result.stdout:
Sched:ProcessTimeout = 00:03:00
Description:
  Advanced scheduling tools

Usage:
   sched [options] command

Options:
  --help, -h, -?  Shows help

Commands:
  run [options] config_file         Runs or mock-runs a configuration file.
  show [options] count config_file  Shows the next N events
  version [options]                 Shows the program version

result.stdout:
Sched:ProcessTimeout = 00:03:00
Description:
  Runs or mock-runs a configuration file.

Usage:
  sched run [options] config_file

Arguments:
  config_file  Sched configuration file

Options:
  --mock, -m      Instead of running the configured commands, it just outputs the command that would be executed.
  --help, -h, -?  Shows help

result.stdout:
Sched:ProcessTimeout = 00:03:00
Description:
  Shows the next N events

Usage:
  sched show [options] count config_file

Arguments:
  count        Number of events to show
  config_file  sched configuration file

Options:
  --random, -r, --rnd  Apply randomization config and show randomized times
  --help, -h, -?       Shows help
